name: @outseta/n8n-nodes-outseta
description: n8n community node for the Outseta REST API
author: Outseta

scripts.build: bun build src/credentials/OutsetaApi.credentials.ts --outdir dist/credentials --format cjs --target node --external n8n-workflow && bun build src/nodes/Outseta/Outseta.node.ts --outdir dist/nodes/Outseta --format cjs --target node --external n8n-workflow && cp src/nodes/Outseta/outseta.svg dist/nodes/Outseta/
